name: openEuler sig-haskell SIG
description: Haskell SIG taking care of porting haskell compiler and others software components to openEuler ecosystem

name: openEuler sig-haskell SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-haskell SIG maintains 250 repositories in the Compiler and Toolchain domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-haskell SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Haskell SIG taking care of porting haskell compiler and others software components to openEuler ecosystem. The SIG has 4 core members and maintains 250 repositories in the Compiler and Toolchain domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-haskell SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-haskell SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-haskell SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-haskell SIG maintains 250 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-haskell.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-haskell SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-haskell SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Runze Lin, Kai Liu, Fengguang Wu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
